title: Lambda@Edge & CloudFront Functions
description: Implement Lambda@Edge and CloudFront Functions for low-latency request manipulation at the CDN edge. Architect solutions for A/B testing and security header injection using edge computing to reduce origin latency.
objectives: Implement Lambda@Edge and CloudFront Functions for low-latency request manipulation at the CDN edge.
Architect solutions for A/B testing and security header injection using edge computing to reduce origin latency.
